title: Paradise
why_this_song: Paradise by Coldplay (2011) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 36 times; first heard in: "And dreamed of para-para-paradise"
Appears 18 times; first heard in: "And dreamed of para-para-paradise"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "In the night, the stormy night, she'd close her eyes"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "In the night, the stormy night, she'd close her eyes"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "para" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "para" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "paradise" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "paradise" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Paradise" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Paradise" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Paradise" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Paradise"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Coldplay one question about "Paradise", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Coldplay sobre "Paradise", o que seria e por quê?
